name: nhb-project-delivery
description: Project delivery management and status reporting platform for NHB (Norsk Hydro Brazil)

scripts.docker:deploy: docker compose build app && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose down && docker compose build app --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && pnpm run bootstrap:env && pnpm docker:up && pnpm run bootstrap:wait-db && pnpm --filter @nhb-status-report/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @nhb-status-report/api prisma:migrate && pnpm --filter @nhb-status-report/api prisma:seed && pnpm dev
